texto: Because I know if I sit down and start to write out how it feels…. it all becomes too real… the pain becomes too much. But that's the weird part because I feel so empty, like there no longer is a heart living where there used to be one, so why am I feeling pain?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Chriselle Ravadilla: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Because I know if I sit down and start to write out how it feels…. it all becomes too real… the p…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, heartbreak, lovers pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de lovers.
